57	| DesignerHome "Open Existing" | transparent | `var(--io-text-secondary)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius)` | 9px 22px | 13 | 500 |
58	| DesignerImport `secondaryBtn` | transparent | `var(--io-text-muted)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius, 6px)` | 8px 18px | 13 | 500 |
59	| Toolbar Delete | transparent | `var(--io-danger)` (enabled) / `var(--io-text-disabled)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `6` (integer) | 4px 10px | 12 | — |
60	| Toolbar Save | transparent | `var(--io-accent)` (dirty) / `var(--io-text-disabled)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `6` (integer) | 4px 10px | 12 | — |
61	| Toolbar Publish | transparent | `var(--io-accent)` (enabled) / `var(--io-text-disabled)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `6` (integer) | 4px 10px | 12 | — |
62	| DeleteDialog "Cancel" | `var(--io-surface-elevated)` | `var(--io-text-primary)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius)` | 8px 18px | 13 | 500 |
63	| SymbolLibrary shape "Delete" | transparent | `var(--io-text-muted)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius)` | 4px 10px | 11 | — |
64	
65	**Destructive button:**
66	
67	| Location | Style | background | color |
68	|---|---|---|---|
69	| GraphicsList hover overlay "Delete" | ghost | `rgba(239,68,68,0.15)`, border `rgba(239,68,68,0.5)` | `#f87171` |
70	| GraphicsList DeleteDialog "Delete" confirm | solid | `#ef4444` | `#fff` |
71	
72	**Icon button (IconBtn):**
73	- Size: 32×32, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`, no border
74	- Active: `background: "var(--io-accent)"`, `color: "#09090b"` (hardcoded)
75	- Inactive: `background: "transparent"`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"`
76	- Hover (inactive): `background: "var(--io-surface-elevated)"`
77	- Disabled: `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `opacity: 0.4`
78	- Transition: `background 0.1s, color 0.1s`
79	
80	**Toggle/chip buttons (NewGraphicDialog mode/scope/preset selectors):**
81	- Mode/scope: active `background: "var(--io-accent)"`, `color: "var(--io-accent-foreground)"`; inactive `background: "var(--io-surface)"`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"`; `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`, `fontSize: 12`
82	- Preset chips: same active/inactive logic; `borderRadius: "calc(var(--io-radius) * 2)"` (pill shape), `fontSize: 11`
83	
84	**Tab close button (DesignerTabBar:208–238):**
85	- 16×16, `borderRadius: 3` (hardcoded integer), `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `fontSize: 14`
86	- Hover: `background: "rgba(239,68,68,0.15)"`, `color: "#f87171"` (hardcoded, no token)
87	
88	**StatusBar TEST MODE pause/resume (DesignerStatusBar:327–352):**
89	- `borderRadius: 3` (hardcoded), height 20, `fontSize: 13`, `padding: "0 5px"`
90	- Paused: `background: "rgba(74,222,128,0.12)"`, `border: "1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.4)"`, `color: "#4ade80"` — all hardcoded
91	- Live: `background: "rgba(239,68,68,0.12)"`, `border: "1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.4)"`, `color: "#ef4444"` — all hardcoded
92	
93	**Deviations from app shell:**
94	
95	1. **Primary button text color inconsistency.** DesignerHome "New" correctly uses `var(--io-accent-foreground)`. Every other primary button in the shell uses `#fff` or `#09090b` hardcoded. In the light theme `--io-accent-foreground` resolves to `#fff` (light theme value differs from dark), so these hardcoded values will not adapt. SymbolLibrary "Upload SVG" uses `#09090b` which is the dark-mode accent foreground value — correct for dark but wrong for light.
96	
97	2. **DesignerImport `primaryBtn` has a wrong fallback.** `background: "var(--io-accent, #3b82f6)"` — the fallback `#3b82f6` (blue) does not match the accent token (`#2dd4bf` in dark theme). The fallback is unreachable in practice but is incorrect.
98	
99	3. **Toolbar text action buttons use `borderRadius: 6` (integer literal)** rather than `var(--io-radius)`. IconBtn in the same toolbar uses `var(--io-radius)`. Both resolve to 6px currently but the inconsistency is present.
100	
101	4. **Tab close button and StatusBar button use `borderRadius: 3` (hardcoded integer)** — no token reference.
102	
103	5. **No shared button primitive for primary/secondary/destructive patterns.** Six files each define their own inline-style primary button with minor variations (different padding, slightly different color token usage). No `<Button>` component exists.
104	
105	6. **Two incompatible destructive button styles.** Ghost destructive (rgba red background + red border + `#f87171` text) used for hover-overlay delete; solid destructive (`#ef4444` fill + `#fff` text) used for modal confirm. No system governs which to use where.
106	
107	7. **StatusBar clickable segments are `<div>` elements, not `<button>` elements.** Grid, zoom, and binding-summary clickable segments use `<div onClick>` with `cursor: "pointer"`. This bypasses keyboard navigation and accessibility semantics.
108	
109	8. **Secondary button color token varies.** DesignerHome secondary uses `--io-text-secondary`; DesignerImport secondary uses `--io-text-muted`; toolbar Save/Delete use `--io-accent` / `--io-danger` for active state. No consistent secondary button color convention.
110	
111	**Notes:** The DesignerModeTabs mode tab buttons function as primary navigation buttons (role=button, onClick sets mode). They are styled as tabs (active bottom border, font-weight change) rather than as buttons. They are not captured in the above patterns but share the active/inactive token convention of toggle buttons.
112	
113	---
114	
115	## Category 8 — Status Indicators
116	
117	**Implementation:** `inline-styles`, all module-local. No shared status indicator
118	component. Indicators are scattered across DesignerToolbar (dirty dot, read-only
119	badge), DesignerTabBar (modified dot), and DesignerStatusBar (WS dot, binding
120	summary, mode label, auto-save label, TEST MODE).
121	
122	**Source-of-truth files:**
123	
124	| Indicator | File | Lines |
125	|---|---|---|
126	| WS connection dot | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 204–216 |
127	| Point binding summary | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 220–234 |
128	| Grid size segment | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 238–245 |
129	| Zoom level segment | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 249–309 |
130	| Mode indicator (Edit / Read-Only) | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 313–358 |
131	| TEST MODE indicator + pause/resume | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 314–353 |
132	| Auto-save indicator | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 363–371 |
133	| Dirty / unsaved-changes dot | `DesignerToolbar.tsx` | 1584–1597 |
134	| READ-ONLY badge | `DesignerToolbar.tsx` | 1598–1615 |
135	| Modified dot in tab | `DesignerTabBar.tsx` | 181–193 |
136	
137	**Visual properties actually applied (concrete values):**
138	
139	**WS connection dot (DesignerStatusBar:204–216):**
140	- Glyph: `●` (U+25CF), `fontSize: 8`, `lineHeight: 1`
141	- Connected: `color: "#22c55e"` (hardcoded)
142	- Disconnected: `color: "#ef4444"` (hardcoded)
143	- Adjacent label: "Connected" / "Disconnected", 11px, `var(--io-text-secondary)`
144	
145	**Point binding summary (DesignerStatusBar:220–234):**
146	- Normal state: "Points: N bound" — 11px, `var(--io-text-secondary)`, entire segment clickable
147	- Unresolved state: appends `({unresolved} unresolved)` in `color: "#f97316"` (hardcoded orange)
148	
149	**Dirty indicator (DesignerToolbar:1584–1597):**
150	- 7×7px `<div>`, `borderRadius: "50%"`, `background: "#f97316"` (hardcoded orange)
151	- Title tooltip: "Unsaved changes"
152	
153	**READ-ONLY badge (DesignerToolbar:1598–1615):**
154	- Text: "READ-ONLY", `fontSize: 11`, `fontWeight: 600`, `letterSpacing: "0.05em"`
155	- `padding: "3px 8px"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`
156	- `background: "rgba(234,179,8,0.15)"`, `border: "1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.4)"`, `color: "#eab308"` — all hardcoded
157	
158	**Modified dot in TabBar (DesignerTabBar:181–193):**
159	- Glyph: `●` (●), `fontSize: 14`, `lineHeight: 1`
160	- `color: "var(--io-warning, #f59e0b)"` — uses token with fallback (only status indicator that references a token)
161	
162	**TEST MODE indicator (DesignerStatusBar:314–340):**
163	- Text: "TEST MODE", `fontWeight: 600`, `letterSpacing: "0.06em"`, `color: "#4ade80"` (hardcoded)
164	- Animated: CSS keyframes injected via inline `<style>` — `@keyframes io-test-mode-glow { 0%,100% { text-shadow: 0 0 6px #4ade80; opacity:1; } 50% { text-shadow: 0 0 14px #4ade80, 0 0 28px #4ade80; opacity:0.9; } }`
165	- Pause/resume button: colors fully hardcoded (#4ade80 / #ef4444), `borderRadius: 3`
166	
167	**Auto-save indicator (DesignerStatusBar:363–371):**
168	- Text: "Auto-saved N ago" — 11px, `var(--io-text-secondary)`, right-aligned via flex spacer
169	- Conditional render: only appears when `lastAutoSave != null`
170	
171	**Deviations from app shell:**
172	
173	1. **WS dot colors bypass tokens.** `#22c55e` / `#ef4444` are the dark-mode values of `--io-alarm-normal` / `--io-alarm-urgent` respectively, but are not referenced via tokens. Light-theme adaptation fails.
174	
175	2. **Dirty indicator uses `#f97316`.** Same hex as `--io-alarm-high` dark value, not a token reference.
176	
177	3. **Unresolved bindings text uses `#f97316`.** Same pattern — hardcoded rather than `var(--io-alarm-high)`.
178	
179	4. **READ-ONLY badge uses fully hardcoded yellow palette.** Token `--io-warning: #f59e0b` exists in the registry but is not used; the badge uses `#eab308` (a slightly different yellow) with `rgba()` background/border variants.
180	
181	5. **TEST MODE indicator fully hardcoded.** `#4ade80` (green) and `rgba(74,222,128,*)` are used throughout; no token maps to this color. The animated glow keyframe is injected as a raw `<style>` tag inside the JSX, creating a new `<style>` element on every render cycle when testMode is active.
182	
183	6. **TabBar modified dot is the only status indicator that uses a token.** `var(--io-warning, #f59e0b)` is correct usage. All other status indicators bypass the token system.
184	
185	7. **No semantic severity taxonomy.** Three separate "warning" states (dirty indicator, READ-ONLY badge, unresolved bindings) all use different oranges/yellows (`#f97316`, `#eab308`, `rgba(234,179,8,*)`) with no shared token or visual convention linking them.
186	
187	**Notes:** The mode indicator in the non-test-mode case ("Edit" / "Read-Only") renders in plain `var(--io-text-secondary)` with no visual differentiation between edit and read-only states beyond the text label. The READ-ONLY badge in the toolbar is the only distinct visual signal for the read-only permission state.
188	
189	---
190	
191	## Category 9 — Labels and Headers
192	
193	**Implementation:** `inline-styles`. No shared heading or label component exists.
194	Semantic HTML heading elements (`h1`, `h2`, `h3`) are used only in SymbolLibrary
195	and DesignerGraphicsList DeleteDialog; all other headers are styled `<div>` or
196	`<span>` elements with bare font-size and weight literals.
197	
198	**Source-of-truth files:**
199	
200	| Element | File | Lines |
201	|---|---|---|
202	| Page h1 "Symbol Library" | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 495–501 |
203	| Page subtitle (SymbolLibrary) | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 503–511 |
204	| Section h2 "ISA-101 Equipment Shapes" | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 519–524 |
205	| Section h2 "Custom Shapes" | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 335–344 |
206	| Category card label | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 97–103 |
207	| Category card description | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 119–126 |
208	| Page breadcrumb "Designer" link | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 899–912 |
209	| Breadcrumb separator "/" | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 913 |
210	| Page breadcrumb "Process Graphics" (current) | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 914–922 |
211	| GraphicCard name | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 439–449 |
212	| GraphicCard description | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 453–467 |
213	| GraphicCard timestamp | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 469–479 |
214	| DeleteDialog h3 "Delete Graphic" | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 583–590 |
215	| DeleteDialog body text | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 592–606 |
216	| DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle | `DesignerHome.tsx` | 44–54 |
217	| NewGraphicDialog title | `index.tsx` | 259–271 |
218	| NewGraphicDialog form labels (`labelStyle`) | `index.tsx` | 223–231 |
219	| DesignerImport form `label` style | `DesignerImport.tsx` | 55–62 |
220	| DesignerImport step indicator labels | `DesignerImport.tsx` | 149–163 |
221	| Mode tab labels ("Graphic" / "Dashboard" / "Report") | `DesignerModeTabs.tsx` | 219–267 |
222	| File dropdown trigger "File" | `DesignerModeTabs.tsx` | 313–314 |
223	| Tab bar labels (graphic name) | `DesignerTabBar.tsx` | 195–204 |
224	| StatusBar segment labels | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 174–184 |
225	| TEST MODE label | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 319–325 |
226	
227	**Visual properties actually applied (concrete values):**
228	
229	**Page-level headers:**
230	
231	| Element | Tag | fontSize | weight | color |
232	|---|---|---|---|---|
233	| "Symbol Library" h1 | `<h1>` | "20px" | 700 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
234	| "Custom Shapes" h2 | `<h2>` | "16px" | 700 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
235	| "ISA-101 Equipment Shapes" h2 | `<h2>` | "15px" | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
236	| "Process Graphics" breadcrumb | `<span>` | 14 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
237	| DeleteDialog "Delete Graphic" h3 | `<h3>` | 16 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
238	
239	**Form / dialog titles:**
240	
241	| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
242	|---|---|---|---|
243	| NewGraphicDialog title | 15 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
244	
245	**Uppercase form field labels:**
246	
247	| Location | fontSize | weight | color | transforms |
248	|---|---|---|---|---|
249	| `index.tsx labelStyle` | 11 | 600 | `var(--io-text-muted)` | uppercase, 0.05em letter-spacing, marginBottom 4 |
250	| `DesignerImport label` style | 12 | 600 | `var(--io-text-muted)` | uppercase, 0.05em letter-spacing, marginBottom 6 |
251	
252	**Subtitle / descriptive text:**
253	
254	| Element | fontSize | color | notes |
255	|---|---|---|---|
256	| DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle | 13 | `var(--io-text-muted)` | letterSpacing 0.03em |
257	| SymbolLibrary page subtitle | "13px" | `var(--io-text-secondary)` | — |
258	| SymbolLibrary "Custom Shapes" subtitle | "12px" | `var(--io-text-secondary)` | below h2 |
259	
260	**Breadcrumb:**
261	
262	| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
263	|---|---|---|---|
264	| "Designer" link | 13 | — | `var(--io-text-muted)` |
265	| "/" separator | 13 | — | `var(--io-border)` |
266	| "Process Graphics" (current) | 14 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
267	
268	**Card content labels:**
269	
270	| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
271	|---|---|---|---|
272	| GraphicCard name | 14 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
273	| GraphicCard description | 12 | — | `var(--io-text-muted)` |
274	| GraphicCard timestamp | 11 | — | `var(--io-text-muted)` |
275	| CategoryCard label | "14px" | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
276	| CategoryCard description | "12px" | — | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
277	
278	**Navigation / toolbar labels:**
279	
280	| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
281	|---|---|---|---|
282	| Mode tab label (active) | 13 | 500 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
283	| Mode tab label (inactive) | 13 | 400 | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
284	| Mode tab icon (◆/▦) | 11 | — | inherited |
285	| Mode tab icon (📄) | 13 | — | inherited |
286	| File dropdown trigger "File" | 13 | — | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
287	| Tab bar label (active) | 12 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
288	| Tab bar label (inactive) | 12 | 400 | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
289	| StatusBar segment text | 11 | — | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
290	| TEST MODE label | inherited | 600 | `#4ade80` (hardcoded) |
291	
292	**DesignerImport step indicator labels:**
293	- Active step: `fontSize: 12`, `fontWeight: 600`, `color: "var(--io-text-primary)"`
294	- Done step: `fontSize: 12`, `fontWeight: 400`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary, #475569)"` (with light-theme fallback)
295	- Future step: `fontSize: 12`, `fontWeight: 400`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
296	
297	**Deviations from app shell:**
298	
299	1. **Section header sizes are inconsistent within SymbolLibrary.** "Custom Shapes" h2 is 16px/weight 700 while "ISA-101 Equipment Shapes" h2 is 15px/weight 600 — same file, same semantic level, different values. There is no size/weight convention for section headings.
300	
301	2. **Uppercase form label duplicated with divergent values.** `index.tsx labelStyle` (11px, marginBottom 4) and `DesignerImport label` (12px, marginBottom 6) serve the same purpose (uppercase section label above a form field) but are not shared and differ in font size and bottom margin. A third instance of the same pattern appears in `DesignerImport.tsx`'s rendered form body.
302	
303	3. **Subtitle text color uses different token tiers for the same semantic role.** DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle (`--io-text-muted`, #71717a) vs SymbolLibrary page subtitle (`--io-text-secondary`, #a1a1aa) — both are 13px descriptive text directly beneath a page-level heading.
304	
305	4. **No `--io-text-*` scale tokens used anywhere.** All font sizes are bare pixel integer literals (11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 20) or string literals with units ("14px", "12px" in SymbolLibrary). The registered token scale (`--io-text-xs: 12px`, `--io-text-sm: 13px`, `--io-text-label: 12px`, `--io-text-label-sm: 11px`) is never referenced. Consistent with the finding in category 2.
306	
307	5. **Heading element inconsistency.** SymbolLibrary uses semantic `<h1>`/`<h2>` tags. DesignerGraphicsList "Process Graphics" uses `<span>`. NewGraphicDialog title is a `<div>`. DeleteDialog uses `<h3>`. No module-level convention for when to use semantic vs presentational elements.
308	
309	6. **Mixed font-size notation in SymbolLibrary.** CategoryCard uses `fontSize: "14px"` and `"12px"` (string with CSS unit), while all other Designer shell files use bare integer literals (`14`, `12`). React inline styles accept both; the inconsistency is within the same file subtree.
310	
311	7. **DesignerImport step indicator includes a light-theme fallback directly in JSX** (`color: "var(--io-text-secondary, #475569)"`) — the only instance in the shell files where a token fallback specifies a light-theme value. `#475569` is a slate-gray that would be correct in light mode but is inconsistent with how other files handle fallbacks (which use dark-mode hex values as fallbacks).
312	
313	**Notes:** The DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle at DesignerHome.tsx:44–54 is a module identifier label, not a page heading — it appears on the splash screen when no graphic is open. No toolbar or mode-tab bar renders visible section titles or headers; all labeling at the toolbar level is handled via icon tooltips (`title` attributes) rather than visible text labels.
314

file.content:
# Designer UI Audit — Pass 1 Supplement: Categories 6, 8, 9

Scope: categories 6, 8, 9 only (buttons; status indicators; labels and headers).
Corrective supplement to `01-designer-pass1.md`, which covered categories 1–4.
Files read: `index.tsx`, `DesignerHome.tsx`, `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx`,
`DesignerToolbar.tsx`, `DesignerModeTabs.tsx`, `DesignerTabBar.tsx`,
`DesignerStatusBar.tsx`, `DesignerImport.tsx` (header/styles block),
`SymbolLibrary.tsx` (header/button layer).

---

## Category 6 — Buttons (Primary, Secondary, Icon Variants)

**Implementation:** `mix`. No shared `<Button>` component exists; all button
patterns are inline-styled individually. Five distinct patterns are in use
across the shell: primary (filled accent), secondary (bordered transparent),
destructive (danger fill or ghost), icon (IconBtn primitive), and toggle/chip.

**Source-of-truth files:**

| Pattern | File | Lines |
|---|---|---|
| IconBtn primitive | `DesignerToolbar.tsx` | 904–948 |
| Toolbar text actions (Delete/Save/Publish) | `DesignerToolbar.tsx` | 1618–1693 |
| Read-only badge | `DesignerToolbar.tsx` | 1598–1615 |
| Tab close button | `DesignerTabBar.tsx` | 208–238 |
| Scroll arrow buttons | `DesignerTabBar.tsx` | 273–300 |
| StatusBar TEST MODE pause/resume | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 327–352 |
| Home screen primary / secondary | `DesignerHome.tsx` | 55–84 |
| GraphicsList header "New Graphic" | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 927–955 |
| GraphicsList hover overlay Edit / Delete | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 342–379 |
| GraphicsList empty-state "Create Graphic" | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 715–730 |
| GraphicsList DeleteDialog Cancel / Delete | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 608–641 |
| Import primaryBtn / secondaryBtn / disabledBtn | `DesignerImport.tsx` | 64–90 |
| SymbolLibrary "Upload SVG" | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 356–376 |
| SymbolLibrary "Delete" (custom shape row) | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 233–260 |
| NewGraphicDialog mode/scope/preset toggles | `index.tsx` | 290–390 |
| NewGraphicDialog proportional lock | `index.tsx` | 435–450 |

**Visual properties actually applied (concrete values):**

**Primary button (filled accent):**

| Location | background | color | border | radius | padding | fontSize | weight |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DesignerHome "New" | `var(--io-accent)` | `var(--io-accent-foreground)` | none | `var(--io-radius)` | 9px 22px | 13 | 600 |
| GraphicsList "New Graphic" | `var(--io-accent)` | `#fff` (hardcoded) | none | `var(--io-radius)` | 7px 16px | 13 | 600 |
| GraphicsList hover "Edit" | `var(--io-accent)` | `#fff` (hardcoded) | none | `var(--io-radius)` | 7px 18px | 13 | 600 |
| GraphicsList empty "Create Graphic" | `var(--io-accent)` | `#fff` (hardcoded) | none | `var(--io-radius)` | 9px 20px | 13 | 600 |
| DesignerImport `primaryBtn` | `var(--io-accent, #3b82f6)` | `#fff` (hardcoded) | none | `var(--io-radius, 6px)` | 8px 18px | 13 | 600 |
| SymbolLibrary "Upload SVG" | `var(--io-accent)` | `#09090b` (hardcoded) | none | `var(--io-radius)` | 7px 14px | 12 | 600 |

**Secondary button (bordered, transparent bg):**

| Location | background | color | border | radius | padding | fontSize | weight |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DesignerHome "Open Existing" | transparent | `var(--io-text-secondary)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius)` | 9px 22px | 13 | 500 |
| DesignerImport `secondaryBtn` | transparent | `var(--io-text-muted)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius, 6px)` | 8px 18px | 13 | 500 |
| Toolbar Delete | transparent | `var(--io-danger)` (enabled) / `var(--io-text-disabled)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `6` (integer) | 4px 10px | 12 | — |
| Toolbar Save | transparent | `var(--io-accent)` (dirty) / `var(--io-text-disabled)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `6` (integer) | 4px 10px | 12 | — |
| Toolbar Publish | transparent | `var(--io-accent)` (enabled) / `var(--io-text-disabled)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `6` (integer) | 4px 10px | 12 | — |
| DeleteDialog "Cancel" | `var(--io-surface-elevated)` | `var(--io-text-primary)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius)` | 8px 18px | 13 | 500 |
| SymbolLibrary shape "Delete" | transparent | `var(--io-text-muted)` | `1px solid var(--io-border)` | `var(--io-radius)` | 4px 10px | 11 | — |

**Destructive button:**

| Location | Style | background | color |
|---|---|---|---|
| GraphicsList hover overlay "Delete" | ghost | `rgba(239,68,68,0.15)`, border `rgba(239,68,68,0.5)` | `#f87171` |
| GraphicsList DeleteDialog "Delete" confirm | solid | `#ef4444` | `#fff` |

**Icon button (IconBtn):**
- Size: 32×32, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`, no border
- Active: `background: "var(--io-accent)"`, `color: "#09090b"` (hardcoded)
- Inactive: `background: "transparent"`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"`
- Hover (inactive): `background: "var(--io-surface-elevated)"`
- Disabled: `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `opacity: 0.4`
- Transition: `background 0.1s, color 0.1s`

**Toggle/chip buttons (NewGraphicDialog mode/scope/preset selectors):**
- Mode/scope: active `background: "var(--io-accent)"`, `color: "var(--io-accent-foreground)"`; inactive `background: "var(--io-surface)"`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"`; `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`, `fontSize: 12`
- Preset chips: same active/inactive logic; `borderRadius: "calc(var(--io-radius) * 2)"` (pill shape), `fontSize: 11`

**Tab close button (DesignerTabBar:208–238):**
- 16×16, `borderRadius: 3` (hardcoded integer), `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `fontSize: 14`
- Hover: `background: "rgba(239,68,68,0.15)"`, `color: "#f87171"` (hardcoded, no token)

**StatusBar TEST MODE pause/resume (DesignerStatusBar:327–352):**
- `borderRadius: 3` (hardcoded), height 20, `fontSize: 13`, `padding: "0 5px"`
- Paused: `background: "rgba(74,222,128,0.12)"`, `border: "1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.4)"`, `color: "#4ade80"` — all hardcoded
- Live: `background: "rgba(239,68,68,0.12)"`, `border: "1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.4)"`, `color: "#ef4444"` — all hardcoded

**Deviations from app shell:**

1. **Primary button text color inconsistency.** DesignerHome "New" correctly uses `var(--io-accent-foreground)`. Every other primary button in the shell uses `#fff` or `#09090b` hardcoded. In the light theme `--io-accent-foreground` resolves to `#fff` (light theme value differs from dark), so these hardcoded values will not adapt. SymbolLibrary "Upload SVG" uses `#09090b` which is the dark-mode accent foreground value — correct for dark but wrong for light.

2. **DesignerImport `primaryBtn` has a wrong fallback.** `background: "var(--io-accent, #3b82f6)"` — the fallback `#3b82f6` (blue) does not match the accent token (`#2dd4bf` in dark theme). The fallback is unreachable in practice but is incorrect.

3. **Toolbar text action buttons use `borderRadius: 6` (integer literal)** rather than `var(--io-radius)`. IconBtn in the same toolbar uses `var(--io-radius)`. Both resolve to 6px currently but the inconsistency is present.

4. **Tab close button and StatusBar button use `borderRadius: 3` (hardcoded integer)** — no token reference.

5. **No shared button primitive for primary/secondary/destructive patterns.** Six files each define their own inline-style primary button with minor variations (different padding, slightly different color token usage). No `<Button>` component exists.

6. **Two incompatible destructive button styles.** Ghost destructive (rgba red background + red border + `#f87171` text) used for hover-overlay delete; solid destructive (`#ef4444` fill + `#fff` text) used for modal confirm. No system governs which to use where.

7. **StatusBar clickable segments are `<div>` elements, not `<button>` elements.** Grid, zoom, and binding-summary clickable segments use `<div onClick>` with `cursor: "pointer"`. This bypasses keyboard navigation and accessibility semantics.

8. **Secondary button color token varies.** DesignerHome secondary uses `--io-text-secondary`; DesignerImport secondary uses `--io-text-muted`; toolbar Save/Delete use `--io-accent` / `--io-danger` for active state. No consistent secondary button color convention.

**Notes:** The DesignerModeTabs mode tab buttons function as primary navigation buttons (role=button, onClick sets mode). They are styled as tabs (active bottom border, font-weight change) rather than as buttons. They are not captured in the above patterns but share the active/inactive token convention of toggle buttons.

---

## Category 8 — Status Indicators

**Implementation:** `inline-styles`, all module-local. No shared status indicator
component. Indicators are scattered across DesignerToolbar (dirty dot, read-only
badge), DesignerTabBar (modified dot), and DesignerStatusBar (WS dot, binding
summary, mode label, auto-save label, TEST MODE).

**Source-of-truth files:**

| Indicator | File | Lines |
|---|---|---|
| WS connection dot | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 204–216 |
| Point binding summary | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 220–234 |
| Grid size segment | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 238–245 |
| Zoom level segment | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 249–309 |
| Mode indicator (Edit / Read-Only) | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 313–358 |
| TEST MODE indicator + pause/resume | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 314–353 |
| Auto-save indicator | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 363–371 |
| Dirty / unsaved-changes dot | `DesignerToolbar.tsx` | 1584–1597 |
| READ-ONLY badge | `DesignerToolbar.tsx` | 1598–1615 |
| Modified dot in tab | `DesignerTabBar.tsx` | 181–193 |

**Visual properties actually applied (concrete values):**

**WS connection dot (DesignerStatusBar:204–216):**
- Glyph: `●` (U+25CF), `fontSize: 8`, `lineHeight: 1`
- Connected: `color: "#22c55e"` (hardcoded)
- Disconnected: `color: "#ef4444"` (hardcoded)
- Adjacent label: "Connected" / "Disconnected", 11px, `var(--io-text-secondary)`

**Point binding summary (DesignerStatusBar:220–234):**
- Normal state: "Points: N bound" — 11px, `var(--io-text-secondary)`, entire segment clickable
- Unresolved state: appends `({unresolved} unresolved)` in `color: "#f97316"` (hardcoded orange)

**Dirty indicator (DesignerToolbar:1584–1597):**
- 7×7px `<div>`, `borderRadius: "50%"`, `background: "#f97316"` (hardcoded orange)
- Title tooltip: "Unsaved changes"

**READ-ONLY badge (DesignerToolbar:1598–1615):**
- Text: "READ-ONLY", `fontSize: 11`, `fontWeight: 600`, `letterSpacing: "0.05em"`
- `padding: "3px 8px"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`
- `background: "rgba(234,179,8,0.15)"`, `border: "1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.4)"`, `color: "#eab308"` — all hardcoded

**Modified dot in TabBar (DesignerTabBar:181–193):**
- Glyph: `●` (●), `fontSize: 14`, `lineHeight: 1`
- `color: "var(--io-warning, #f59e0b)"` — uses token with fallback (only status indicator that references a token)

**TEST MODE indicator (DesignerStatusBar:314–340):**
- Text: "TEST MODE", `fontWeight: 600`, `letterSpacing: "0.06em"`, `color: "#4ade80"` (hardcoded)
- Animated: CSS keyframes injected via inline `<style>` — `@keyframes io-test-mode-glow { 0%,100% { text-shadow: 0 0 6px #4ade80; opacity:1; } 50% { text-shadow: 0 0 14px #4ade80, 0 0 28px #4ade80; opacity:0.9; } }`
- Pause/resume button: colors fully hardcoded (#4ade80 / #ef4444), `borderRadius: 3`

**Auto-save indicator (DesignerStatusBar:363–371):**
- Text: "Auto-saved N ago" — 11px, `var(--io-text-secondary)`, right-aligned via flex spacer
- Conditional render: only appears when `lastAutoSave != null`

**Deviations from app shell:**

1. **WS dot colors bypass tokens.** `#22c55e` / `#ef4444` are the dark-mode values of `--io-alarm-normal` / `--io-alarm-urgent` respectively, but are not referenced via tokens. Light-theme adaptation fails.

2. **Dirty indicator uses `#f97316`.** Same hex as `--io-alarm-high` dark value, not a token reference.

3. **Unresolved bindings text uses `#f97316`.** Same pattern — hardcoded rather than `var(--io-alarm-high)`.

4. **READ-ONLY badge uses fully hardcoded yellow palette.** Token `--io-warning: #f59e0b` exists in the registry but is not used; the badge uses `#eab308` (a slightly different yellow) with `rgba()` background/border variants.

5. **TEST MODE indicator fully hardcoded.** `#4ade80` (green) and `rgba(74,222,128,*)` are used throughout; no token maps to this color. The animated glow keyframe is injected as a raw `<style>` tag inside the JSX, creating a new `<style>` element on every render cycle when testMode is active.

6. **TabBar modified dot is the only status indicator that uses a token.** `var(--io-warning, #f59e0b)` is correct usage. All other status indicators bypass the token system.

7. **No semantic severity taxonomy.** Three separate "warning" states (dirty indicator, READ-ONLY badge, unresolved bindings) all use different oranges/yellows (`#f97316`, `#eab308`, `rgba(234,179,8,*)`) with no shared token or visual convention linking them.

**Notes:** The mode indicator in the non-test-mode case ("Edit" / "Read-Only") renders in plain `var(--io-text-secondary)` with no visual differentiation between edit and read-only states beyond the text label. The READ-ONLY badge in the toolbar is the only distinct visual signal for the read-only permission state.

---

## Category 9 — Labels and Headers

**Implementation:** `inline-styles`. No shared heading or label component exists.
Semantic HTML heading elements (`h1`, `h2`, `h3`) are used only in SymbolLibrary
and DesignerGraphicsList DeleteDialog; all other headers are styled `<div>` or
`<span>` elements with bare font-size and weight literals.

**Source-of-truth files:**

| Element | File | Lines |
|---|---|---|
| Page h1 "Symbol Library" | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 495–501 |
| Page subtitle (SymbolLibrary) | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 503–511 |
| Section h2 "ISA-101 Equipment Shapes" | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 519–524 |
| Section h2 "Custom Shapes" | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 335–344 |
| Category card label | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 97–103 |
| Category card description | `SymbolLibrary.tsx` | 119–126 |
| Page breadcrumb "Designer" link | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 899–912 |
| Breadcrumb separator "/" | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 913 |
| Page breadcrumb "Process Graphics" (current) | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 914–922 |
| GraphicCard name | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 439–449 |
| GraphicCard description | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 453–467 |
| GraphicCard timestamp | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 469–479 |
| DeleteDialog h3 "Delete Graphic" | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 583–590 |
| DeleteDialog body text | `DesignerGraphicsList.tsx` | 592–606 |
| DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle | `DesignerHome.tsx` | 44–54 |
| NewGraphicDialog title | `index.tsx` | 259–271 |
| NewGraphicDialog form labels (`labelStyle`) | `index.tsx` | 223–231 |
| DesignerImport form `label` style | `DesignerImport.tsx` | 55–62 |
| DesignerImport step indicator labels | `DesignerImport.tsx` | 149–163 |
| Mode tab labels ("Graphic" / "Dashboard" / "Report") | `DesignerModeTabs.tsx` | 219–267 |
| File dropdown trigger "File" | `DesignerModeTabs.tsx` | 313–314 |
| Tab bar labels (graphic name) | `DesignerTabBar.tsx` | 195–204 |
| StatusBar segment labels | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 174–184 |
| TEST MODE label | `DesignerStatusBar.tsx` | 319–325 |

**Visual properties actually applied (concrete values):**

**Page-level headers:**

| Element | Tag | fontSize | weight | color |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| "Symbol Library" h1 | `<h1>` | "20px" | 700 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| "Custom Shapes" h2 | `<h2>` | "16px" | 700 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| "ISA-101 Equipment Shapes" h2 | `<h2>` | "15px" | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| "Process Graphics" breadcrumb | `<span>` | 14 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| DeleteDialog "Delete Graphic" h3 | `<h3>` | 16 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |

**Form / dialog titles:**

| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
|---|---|---|---|
| NewGraphicDialog title | 15 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |

**Uppercase form field labels:**

| Location | fontSize | weight | color | transforms |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `index.tsx labelStyle` | 11 | 600 | `var(--io-text-muted)` | uppercase, 0.05em letter-spacing, marginBottom 4 |
| `DesignerImport label` style | 12 | 600 | `var(--io-text-muted)` | uppercase, 0.05em letter-spacing, marginBottom 6 |

**Subtitle / descriptive text:**

| Element | fontSize | color | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle | 13 | `var(--io-text-muted)` | letterSpacing 0.03em |
| SymbolLibrary page subtitle | "13px" | `var(--io-text-secondary)` | — |
| SymbolLibrary "Custom Shapes" subtitle | "12px" | `var(--io-text-secondary)` | below h2 |

**Breadcrumb:**

| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
|---|---|---|---|
| "Designer" link | 13 | — | `var(--io-text-muted)` |
| "/" separator | 13 | — | `var(--io-border)` |
| "Process Graphics" (current) | 14 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |

**Card content labels:**

| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
|---|---|---|---|
| GraphicCard name | 14 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| GraphicCard description | 12 | — | `var(--io-text-muted)` |
| GraphicCard timestamp | 11 | — | `var(--io-text-muted)` |
| CategoryCard label | "14px" | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| CategoryCard description | "12px" | — | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |

**Navigation / toolbar labels:**

| Element | fontSize | weight | color |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mode tab label (active) | 13 | 500 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| Mode tab label (inactive) | 13 | 400 | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
| Mode tab icon (◆/▦) | 11 | — | inherited |
| Mode tab icon (📄) | 13 | — | inherited |
| File dropdown trigger "File" | 13 | — | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
| Tab bar label (active) | 12 | 600 | `var(--io-text-primary)` |
| Tab bar label (inactive) | 12 | 400 | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
| StatusBar segment text | 11 | — | `var(--io-text-secondary)` |
| TEST MODE label | inherited | 600 | `#4ade80` (hardcoded) |

**DesignerImport step indicator labels:**
- Active step: `fontSize: 12`, `fontWeight: 600`, `color: "var(--io-text-primary)"`
- Done step: `fontSize: 12`, `fontWeight: 400`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary, #475569)"` (with light-theme fallback)
- Future step: `fontSize: 12`, `fontWeight: 400`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`

**Deviations from app shell:**

1. **Section header sizes are inconsistent within SymbolLibrary.** "Custom Shapes" h2 is 16px/weight 700 while "ISA-101 Equipment Shapes" h2 is 15px/weight 600 — same file, same semantic level, different values. There is no size/weight convention for section headings.

2. **Uppercase form label duplicated with divergent values.** `index.tsx labelStyle` (11px, marginBottom 4) and `DesignerImport label` (12px, marginBottom 6) serve the same purpose (uppercase section label above a form field) but are not shared and differ in font size and bottom margin. A third instance of the same pattern appears in `DesignerImport.tsx`'s rendered form body.

3. **Subtitle text color uses different token tiers for the same semantic role.** DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle (`--io-text-muted`, #71717a) vs SymbolLibrary page subtitle (`--io-text-secondary`, #a1a1aa) — both are 13px descriptive text directly beneath a page-level heading.

4. **No `--io-text-*` scale tokens used anywhere.** All font sizes are bare pixel integer literals (11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 20) or string literals with units ("14px", "12px" in SymbolLibrary). The registered token scale (`--io-text-xs: 12px`, `--io-text-sm: 13px`, `--io-text-label: 12px`, `--io-text-label-sm: 11px`) is never referenced. Consistent with the finding in category 2.

5. **Heading element inconsistency.** SymbolLibrary uses semantic `<h1>`/`<h2>` tags. DesignerGraphicsList "Process Graphics" uses `<span>`. NewGraphicDialog title is a `<div>`. DeleteDialog uses `<h3>`. No module-level convention for when to use semantic vs presentational elements.

6. **Mixed font-size notation in SymbolLibrary.** CategoryCard uses `fontSize: "14px"` and `"12px"` (string with CSS unit), while all other Designer shell files use bare integer literals (`14`, `12`). React inline styles accept both; the inconsistency is within the same file subtree.

7. **DesignerImport step indicator includes a light-theme fallback directly in JSX** (`color: "var(--io-text-secondary, #475569)"`) — the only instance in the shell files where a token fallback specifies a light-theme value. `#475569` is a slate-gray that would be correct in light mode but is inconsistent with how other files handle fallbacks (which use dark-mode hex values as fallbacks).

**Notes:** The DesignerHome "Designer" subtitle at DesignerHome.tsx:44–54 is a module identifier label, not a page heading — it appears on the splash screen when no graphic is open. No toolbar or mode-tab bar renders visible section titles or headers; all labeling at the toolbar level is handled via icon tooltips (`title` attributes) rather than visible text labels.

1	# Designer UI Audit — Pass 2: Side Panels and Forms
2	
3	Scope: categories 5, 7, and 9 (side panels; form inputs; labels/headers in DesignerRightPanel).
4	Primary categories for this pass: 5 (side panels) and 7 (form inputs).
5	Category 9 is audited here only as it appears within DesignerRightPanel, per the plan note;
6	findings from pass 1 supplement and this file will be reconciled at the consolidation step.
7	
8	Files read: `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` (2,707 lines, full file sampled in sections);
9	`DesignerRightPanel.tsx` (5,994 lines, sampled across all tabs);
10	`components/ShapePointSelector.tsx` (1,111 lines, full file);
11	`components/PointPickerModal.tsx` (567 lines, full file).
12	
13	---
14	
15	## Category 5 — Side Panels
16	
17	**Implementation:** `module-local-component`. All four files implement inline-styled
18	panels with no shared side-panel primitive. The right panel is split between a
19	tab-strip top half and a permanent canvas-layers bottom half.
20	
21	**Source-of-truth files:**
22	
23	| Panel | File | Key lines |
24	|---|---|---|
25	| Left palette container | `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` | 2430–2438 |
26	| `SectionHeader` button | `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` | 59–99 |
27	| `PaletteSection` resize handle | `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` | 178–207 |
28	| Equipment category tile (expanded) | `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` | 995–1047 |
29	| Display element tile (expanded) | `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` | 807–858 |
30	| Stencil tile (expanded) | `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` | 1601–1659 |
31	| Chart widget tile | `DesignerLeftPalette.tsx` | 1800–1852 |
32	| Right panel container | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5961–5992 |
33	| `TabBar` component | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5101–5153 |
34	| `CanvasLayersPanel` | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5459–5546 |
35	| `CanvasLayerRow` | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5241–5456 |
36	| `ShapePointSelector` container | `ShapePointSelector.tsx` | 378–393 |
37	| `PointPickerModal` dialog | `PointPickerModal.tsx` | 44–55 |
38	
39	**Visual properties actually applied:**
40	
41	**DesignerLeftPalette container:**
42	- `background: "var(--io-surface)"`, `borderRight: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`
43	- Full-height flex column; `overflow: hidden`
44	
45	**`SectionHeader` (collapsible section button):**
46	- `padding: "6px 10px"`, `fontSize: 11`, `fontWeight: 600`, `textTransform: "uppercase"`,
47	  `letterSpacing: "0.06em"`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `borderBottom: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`
48	- Hover: `background: "var(--io-surface-elevated)"` — set by `onMouseEnter` DOM mutation
49	  (not CSS `:hover`); `onMouseLeave` resets to `"transparent"`
50	- Chevron: 12×12 SVG, animated `transform: rotate(90deg)` on open
51	
52	**`PaletteSection` resize handle:**
53	- `height: 4`, `cursor: "ns-resize"`, `borderBottom: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`
54	- Inactive: transparent; hover and active-drag: `background: "var(--io-accent)"` (via event mutation)
55	
56	**Palette tile matrix (expanded / collapsed):**
57	
58	| Tile type | Expanded size | Collapsed size | Background |
59	|---|---|---|---|
60	| Equipment category | `calc(50% - 4px)` × auto, wraps | 36×36 | `var(--io-surface-sunken)` |
61	| Display element | 72×64 | 32×32 | `var(--io-surface-elevated)` |
62	| Custom shape | 64×64 | 32×32 | `var(--io-surface-elevated)` |
63	| Stencil | 64×48 | 28×28 | `var(--io-surface-elevated)` |
64	| Chart widget | 48×48 | 32×32 | `var(--io-surface-elevated)` |
65	| Report element | 48×48 | 32×32 | `var(--io-surface-elevated)` |
66	
67	- All tile hover: `borderColor: "var(--io-accent)"` via `onMouseEnter` DOM mutation
68	- Equipment tile hover additionally changes bg: `color-mix(in srgb, var(--io-accent) 8%, var(--io-surface-sunken))`
69	- All tiles: `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`, `cursor: "grab"`, `userSelect: "none"`
70	
71	**Drag ghost (shared across all palette drag sources):**
72	- `position: "fixed"`, `zIndex: 9999`, `background: "var(--io-accent)"`,
73	  `color: "#09090b"` (hardcoded), `borderRadius: "4px"` (hardcoded integer), `fontSize: 11`, `fontWeight: 600`
74	- Created as an imperative DOM element appended to `document.body`; Escape key cancels
75	
76	**Point browser section:**
77	- Delegates to `PointsBrowserPanel` (app-shell shared component)
78	- Wrapping div: `maxHeight: 280`, `overflow: "hidden"`, `flexDirection: "column"`
79	
80	**DesignerRightPanel container:**
81	- `background: "var(--io-surface)"`, `borderLeft: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`,
82	  `width` from prop, flex column, `overflow: hidden`, `height: "100%"`
83	- Collapsed state: 9px `writingMode: "vertical-lr"` label "INSPECTOR", `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
84	
85	**`TabBar` component:**
86	- Container: `flexShrink: 0`, `borderBottom: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `background: "var(--io-surface)"`, `overflowX: auto`
87	- Tab button: `padding: "6px 8px"`, `fontSize: 10`, `textTransform: "uppercase"`, `letterSpacing: "0.06em"`, `whiteSpace: "nowrap"`
88	- Active: `fontWeight: 700`, `borderBottom: "2px solid var(--io-accent)"`, `color: "var(--io-text-primary)"`
89	- Inactive: `fontWeight: 500`, `borderBottom: "2px solid transparent"`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
90	- Doc tab: `flex: "0 0 auto"`, `marginLeft: "auto"` — always pushed rightmost
91	
92	**Two-section right panel layout:**
93	- Tab content: `flex: 1`, `overflowY: auto`, `paddingTop: 8` — scrollable
94	- `CanvasLayersPanel`: always visible below; `borderTop: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`
95	
96	**`CanvasLayersPanel` header:**
97	- `padding: "5px 10px 5px 12px"`, `fontSize: 10`, `fontWeight: 700`, `textTransform: "uppercase"`,
98	  `letterSpacing: "0.08em"`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
99	
100	**`CanvasLayerRow`:**
101	- `padding: "2px 4px 2px {4 + depth * 14}px"` (depth-indented)
102	- Selected: `background: "var(--io-accent-subtle, rgba(99,102,241,0.1))"`, `borderLeft: "2px solid var(--io-accent)"` (left accent stripe)
103	- Unselected: transparent background, `borderLeft: "2px solid transparent"`
104	- Node name: `fontSize: 11`; type badge: `fontSize: 8`, `fontWeight: 700`, `letterSpacing: "0.04em"`
105	- Binding tag: `fontSize: 9`, `maxWidth: 56`
106	- Icon buttons (16×16): visibility toggle (👁/○), lock toggle (🔒/○), reorder arrows (↑/↓)
107	
108	**ShapePointSelector container:**
109	- CSS grid: `gridTemplateColumns: "40% 1fr"`, `gridTemplateRows: "auto auto 1fr auto"`, `columnGap: 12`, `rowGap: 6`
110	
111	**PointPickerModal overlay and dialog:**
112	- Overlay: `position: "fixed"`, `zIndex: 1100`, `background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.55)"`
113	- Dialog: `width: "560px"`, `maxWidth: "90vw"`, `maxHeight: "70vh"`, `background: "var(--io-surface-elevated)"`, `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`, `overflow: hidden`
114	- Header: `padding: "12px 16px"`, `borderBottom: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `fontWeight: 600`, `fontSize: "14px"`
115	- Footer: `padding: "10px 16px"`, `borderTop: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`
116	
117	**Deviations from app shell:**
118	
119	1. **Equipment tiles use `var(--io-surface-sunken)`; all other palette tiles use
120	   `var(--io-surface-elevated)`.** Two different surface tiers for palette items of equivalent
121	   semantic weight (draggable source objects). `var(--io-surface-sunken)` was not enumerated
122	   in the pass 1 token survey; it may or may not be registered in `index.css`.
123	
124	2. **Drag ghost hardcodes `borderRadius: "4px"` (integer not `var(--io-radius)`)** and
125	   `color: "#09090b"` — consistent with the toolbar's IconBtn hardcoded foreground from pass 1
126	   (category 1 deviation), but still bypasses the token.
127	
128	3. **Stencil tile (expanded) renders a ⬜ emoji as a placeholder thumbnail** while equipment
129	   tiles render a real `ShapeThumbnail` SVG and display element tiles render a spec-accurate
130	   `DisplayElementPreview` SVG. Three different thumbnail strategies with no visual parity.
131	
132	4. **CanvasLayerRow uses emoji icons (👁, 🔒) for visibility and lock toggles.**
133	   The rest of the Designer uses `<svg>` inline elements or Unicode symbols for icons.
134	   No shared icon convention is applied.
135	
136	5. **`CanvasLayerRow` selected background is `var(--io-accent-subtle, rgba(99,102,241,0.1))`.** The fallback
137	   `rgba(99,102,241,0.1)` is indigo — the app's accent is teal (`#2dd4bf`). If
138	   `var(--io-accent-subtle)` is not registered, the selection highlight renders with the wrong
139	   hue. This is a silent correctness risk on any environment where the token is absent.
140	
141	6. **All panel hover effects are applied via `onMouseEnter`/`onMouseLeave` DOM mutations**
142	   rather than CSS `:hover`. This is consistent across DesignerLeftPalette and mirrors the
143	   pattern established in the toolbar layer (pass 1 observation), but means the hover
144	   state is lost if the user's pointer leaves without triggering `onMouseLeave` (e.g., rapid
145	   focus change).
146	
147	7. **`PointPickerModal` uses a `rgba(0,0,0,0.55)` backdrop.** The pass 1 audit found
148	   `index.tsx` uses `rgba(0,0,0,0.6)` and the registered token `--io-modal-backdrop` is
149	   `rgba(0,0,0,0.7)` (dark) / `rgba(0,0,0,0.5)` (light). Three different backdrop opacities
150	   are now in use across the designer with none matching the registered token.
151	
152	8. **`RowSection` collapsible (used heavily in the RightPanel for display element config)
153	   uses `background: "var(--io-surface-raised)"` for its header.** This token was not
154	   found in the pass 1 token registry survey. If unregistered, the header background
155	   resolves to empty (no background).
156	
157	9. **`PointPickerModal` point list rows use `<div onClick>` not `<button>`.** All list items
158	   in Browse/Search/Favorites/Recent tabs are non-semantic clickable divs. No keyboard
159	   navigation (Tab/Enter) is possible without mouse interaction.
160	
161	**Notes:** The Points section in the left palette delegates entirely to the shared
162	`PointsBrowserPanel` component (app-shell scope). The visual pattern of that component
163	is outside this audit's scope. The palette resize handle is the only interactive surface
164	in the palette that does not have a visible hover indicator in the default Tailwind sense —
165	the 4px bar is invisible (transparent) until hovered or during drag.
166	
167	---
168	
169	## Category 7 — Form Inputs
170	
171	**Implementation:** `mix`. DesignerRightPanel defines a reusable `inputStyle` constant
172	and wraps it in `NumberInput`, `SelectInput`, `ColorInput`, and `ThemedColorSelect`
173	helper components — the densest form input system in the Designer. ShapePointSelector
174	uses its own `inputStyle` with different token references. PointPickerModal defines
175	style constants at module level and uses bare unstyled tag inputs throughout.
176	
177	**Source-of-truth files:**
178	
179	| Element | File | Lines |
180	|---|---|---|
181	| `inputStyle` constant | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 219–229 |
182	| `FieldLabel` component | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 201–217 |
183	| `Field` wrapper | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 231–243 |
184	| `NumberInput` | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 246–277 |
185	| `SelectInput` | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 433–458 |
186	| `ColorInput` | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 301–374 |
187	| `ThemedColorSelect` | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 389–431 |
188	| `RowSection` collapsible | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 3385–3447 |
189	| Checkbox inline pattern | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 790–845 (TransformSection) |
190	| `inputStyle` (ShapePointSelector) | `ShapePointSelector.tsx` | 363–375 |
191	| Search input (PointPickerModal) | `PointPickerModal.tsx` | 68–78 |
192	| Tab chip buttons | `PointPickerModal.tsx` | 80–89 |
193	| Footer buttons | `PointPickerModal.tsx` | 112–128 |
194	
195	**Visual properties actually applied:**
196	
197	**DesignerRightPanel `inputStyle` (applies to all text/number/select inputs):**
198	
199	| Property | Value |
200	|---|---|
201	| `padding` | `"4px 7px"` |
202	| `background` | `"var(--io-surface)"` |
203	| `border` | `"1px solid var(--io-border)"` |
204	| `borderRadius` | `"var(--io-radius)"` |
205	| `color` | `"var(--io-text-primary)"` |
206	| `fontSize` | `12` (bare integer) |
207	| `outline` | `"none"` |
208	| `width` | `"100%"` |
209	| `boxSizing` | `"border-box"` |
210	
211	**`FieldLabel` component:**
212	- `fontSize: 10`, `fontWeight: 600`, `textTransform: "uppercase"`, `letterSpacing: "0.05em"`,
213	  `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `marginBottom: 3`
214	- Renders as `<label>` — semantically correct
215	
216	**`Field` wrapper:**
217	- `marginBottom: 10` — uniform spacing below every field group
218	
219	**`ColorInput` composite:**
220	- Outer div: 28×28 swatch (`background: value`, `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`)
221	- `<input type="color">` positioned absolutely inside swatch (`opacity: 0`) — invisible native picker trigger
222	- Adjacent hex text input: `{...inputStyle, flex: 1}` — hex direct edit
223	- If value is not a valid hex, shows "Theme default" in 10px monospace instead of hex input
224	- Reserved color warning: `fontSize: 9`, `color: "#f97316"` (hardcoded — the same alarm-high value from pass 1 findings)
225	
226	**`ThemedColorSelect`:**
227	- 20×20 swatch + `<select>` with 3 options (White/Gray/Muted, ISA-101 compliant)
228	- Options map to `var(--io-text-primary)`, `var(--io-text-secondary)`, `var(--io-text-muted)` only
229	- Default option: "Default" → reverts to caller-provided `defaultValue`
230	
231	**Checkbox pattern (inline form controls):**
232	- `<label>` wrapper, flex row, `gap: 4`, `fontSize: 11`, `cursor: "pointer"`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"` or `var(--io-text-muted)`
233	- Bare `<input type="checkbox">`, no custom styling
234	
235	**`RowSection` collapsible (display element config sub-sections):**
236	- Container: `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: 4` (integer, not `var(--io-radius)`), `overflow: hidden`
237	- Header div: `padding: "5px 8px"`, `background: "var(--io-surface-raised)"` (potentially unregistered), cursor pointer (div onClick, not a `<button>`)
238	- Title text: `fontSize: 11`, `fontWeight: 600`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"` — NOT uppercase (contrast with `FieldLabel`)
239	- Open/close glyph: ▲/▼ Unicode, `fontSize: 8`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
240	- Body: `padding: "8px 8px 4px"`, `borderTop: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`
241	
242	**Layout toggle buttons (TextReadoutArray):**
243	- Vertical/Horizontal selector: flex pair of `<button>` elements, `flex: 1`, `padding: "3px 0"`, `fontSize: 11`
244	- Active: `border: "1px solid var(--io-accent)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`, `background: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--io-accent) 15%, transparent)"`, `color: "var(--io-accent)"`
245	- Inactive: `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, transparent bg, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
246	
247	**ShapePointSelector `inputStyle`:**
248	
249	| Property | Value |
250	|---|---|
251	| `height` | `26` |
252	| `background` | `"var(--io-input-bg)"` |
253	| `border` | `"1px solid var(--io-input-border)"` |
254	| `color` | `"var(--io-text-primary)"` |
255	| `fontSize` | `"1em"` (relative) |
256	| `padding` | `"0 8px"` |
257	| `borderRadius` | `4` (integer, not token) |
258	
259	**ShapePointSelector drop zone / slot assignment chip:**
260	- Empty zone: `border: "1px dashed {color-mix(in srgb, var(--io-accent) 35%, var(--io-border))}"`, `padding: "14px 12px"`, `bg: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--io-accent) 4%, var(--io-surface))"`
261	- Drag-over zone: `border: "1px dashed var(--io-accent)"`, `bg: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--io-accent) 8%, var(--io-surface))"`
262	- Filled chip: `background: "var(--io-surface-secondary)"`, `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: 3`, tag text: `fontFamily: "JetBrains Mono, monospace"`, `fontSize: "0.95em"`
263	- Point list item hover bg: `"var(--io-surface-hover)"` (confirmed undefined, pass 1)
264	
265	**PointPickerModal input styles:**
266	- Search input: `padding: "8px 12px 8px 32px"` (left offset for icon), `background: "var(--io-surface-sunken)"`, `fontSize: "13px"` (string), `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`
267	- Tab chip buttons (active): `background: "var(--io-accent-subtle)"`, `border: "1px solid var(--io-accent)"`, `color: "var(--io-accent)"`, `fontSize: "12px"` (string), `fontWeight: 600`
268	- Tab chip buttons (inactive): `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"`; `fontWeight: 400`
269	- Row dividers: `borderBottom: "1px solid var(--io-border-subtle)"` (potentially unregistered)
270	- Cancel button: `padding: "6px 14px"`, `border: "1px solid var(--io-border)"`, transparent bg, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"`, `fontSize: "12px"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`
271	- Select (primary) button: `background: "var(--io-accent)"`, `color: "#09090b"` (hardcoded), `fontWeight: 600`, no border
272	
273	**Deviations from app shell:**
274	
275	1. **Three different input background tokens across three files.** DesignerRightPanel:
276	   `var(--io-surface)`. ShapePointSelector: `var(--io-input-bg)`. PointPickerModal:
277	   `var(--io-surface-sunken)`. No consistent input-field background convention exists.
278	
279	2. **`var(--io-input-bg)` and `var(--io-input-border)` in ShapePointSelector are not
280	   in the pass 1 token registry (138 tokens in `index.css`).** If unregistered, inputs
281	   in ShapePointSelector have no background and no border.
282	
283	3. **`var(--io-surface-raised)` in RowSection header background is not in the pass 1
284	   token registry.** If unregistered, RowSection section headers have no background
285	   (renders same as transparent).
286	
287	4. **`var(--io-accent-subtle)` used as active tab background in PointPickerModal and as
288	   selected-row background in CanvasLayerRow.** Its fallback in CanvasLayerRow is
289	   `rgba(99,102,241,0.1)` — indigo, which is the wrong hue if the token resolves to teal.
290	   The token was not enumerated in pass 1; requires verification against `index.css`.
291	
292	5. **`var(--io-border-subtle)` in PointPickerModal row dividers is not enumerated in
293	   pass 1.** If unregistered, list rows have no bottom separator.
294	
295	6. **`var(--io-surface-hover)` in ShapePointSelector point list item hover** is confirmed
296	   undefined (pass 1, category 1 and 4). Hover produces no visual feedback on list items.
297	
298	7. **ShapePointSelector uses `fontSize: "1em"` (relative)** while all other form inputs
299	   in the designer use bare pixel integers (12). This is the only relative font-size
300	   unit in the pass 2 files' input surfaces.
301	
302	8. **ShapePointSelector uses `borderRadius: 4` (integer)** rather than `var(--io-radius)`.
303	   DesignerRightPanel's `inputStyle` correctly uses `var(--io-radius)`. Within the
304	   designer, the two most-used form input surfaces differ in border radius tokens.
305	
306	9. **`RowSection` header is a `<div onClick>`, not a `<button>`.** The collapsible section
307	   header captures clicks but has no focus ring, no keyboard Enter handler, and no ARIA
308	   role. This affects all display element configuration sub-sections in the right panel.
309	
310	10. **PointPickerModal primary button hardcodes `color: "#09090b"`.** Consistent with
311	    the pattern identified in pass 1 (category 6), but the hardcoded foreground color
312	    fails to adapt in the light theme.
313	
314	11. **`FieldLabel` uses `letterSpacing: "0.05em"` while `RowSection` titles use none.**
315	    Both are sub-group labels for form sections but diverge in uppercase treatment
316	    (FieldLabel: uppercase; RowSection: regular case) and color tier (muted vs secondary).
317	
318	12. **`ColorInput` reserved-color warning renders in `color: "#f97316"`** — the same
319	    hardcoded alarm-high orange identified in pass 1 (category 1 deviation), bypassing
320	    `var(--io-alarm-high)`.
321	
322	13. **TextBlock background default values hardcoded as `fill: "#27272A"`, `stroke: "#3F3F46"`**
323	    when enabling "Background Box". These are dark-theme hex values with no token
324	    reference; light theme would apply dark surface colors to a text box background.
325	
326	**Notes:** `NumberInput` uses `type="number"` with a native browser spinner — no custom
327	increment/decrement UI. The range limits (`min`, `max`) are set per-field; there is no
328	shared validation layer. The `SelectInput` component and bare `<select>` elements are
329	styled identically; both correctly apply `cursor: "pointer"` which bare selects usually
330	lack. `ThemedColorSelect` is the most defensible form input pattern in the file: it
331	restricts options to safe ISA-101 compliant tokens and uses a live swatch preview.
332	
333	---
334	
335	## Category 9 — Labels and Headers (DesignerRightPanel only)
336	
337	**Implementation:** `inline-styles`. All labels are `<div>`, `<span>`, or `<label>`
338	elements with bare pixel literals. No semantic heading elements (`h1`, `h2`, `h3`)
339	appear anywhere in DesignerRightPanel. The `FieldLabel` component is the only reusable
340	label primitive in the file; collapsible section headers (`RowSection`) use a divergent
341	pattern.
342	
343	**Source-of-truth files:**
344	
345	| Element | File | Lines |
346	|---|---|---|
347	| `FieldLabel` component | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 201–217 |
348	| `TabBar` tab labels | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5121–5148 |
349	| `CanvasLayersPanel` "Layers" header | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5490–5511 |
350	| `RowSection` section title | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 3416–3427 |
351	| "Shape Info" card header | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 1711–1722 |
352	| Type badge in `CanvasLayerRow` | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5312–5323 |
353	| Hint/helper text boxes | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 1510–1521 (PipeStyleSection) |
354	| `PointResolutionIndicator` labels | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 119–145 |
355	| Collapsed "INSPECTOR" label | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 5706–5712 |
356	| `NavigationLinkEditor` toggle button | `DesignerRightPanel.tsx` | 479–497 |
357	
358	**Visual properties actually applied (concrete values):**
359	
360	**`FieldLabel` (used for all form field labels throughout the file):**
361	
362	| Property | Value |
363	|---|---|
364	| Tag | `<label>` |
365	| `fontSize` | `10` |
366	| `fontWeight` | `600` |
367	| `textTransform` | `"uppercase"` |
368	| `letterSpacing` | `"0.05em"` |
369	| `color` | `"var(--io-text-muted)"` |
370	| `marginBottom` | `3` |
371	
372	**`TabBar` tab button labels:**
373	
374	| State | `fontSize` | `fontWeight` | `color` | `letterSpacing` |
375	|---|---|---|---|---|
376	| Active | `10` | `700` | `var(--io-text-primary)` | `"0.06em"` |
377	| Inactive | `10` | `500` | `var(--io-text-muted)` | `"0.06em"` |
378	| All | uppercase | — | — | `textTransform: "uppercase"` |
379	
380	**`CanvasLayersPanel` "Layers" header:**
381	- `fontSize: 10`, `fontWeight: 700`, `textTransform: "uppercase"`, `letterSpacing: "0.08em"`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
382	
383	**`RowSection` collapsible section title:**
384	- `fontSize: 11`, `fontWeight: 600`, `color: "var(--io-text-secondary)"` — **no uppercase, no letterSpacing**
385	
386	**"Shape Info" card header (SymbolInstanceShapeTab):**
387	- `fontSize: 10`, `fontWeight: 700`, `textTransform: "uppercase"`, `letterSpacing: "0.06em"`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
388	
389	**Type badge in CanvasLayerRow (SYM, DE, GEO, etc.):**
390	- `fontSize: 8`, `fontWeight: 700`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `letterSpacing: "0.04em"`, `minWidth: 24`
391	
392	**Hint/helper text boxes (e.g., PipeStyleSection, SymbolInstanceShapeTab):**
393	- Wrapper: `padding: "6px 8px"`, `background: "var(--io-surface-elevated)"`, `borderRadius: "var(--io-radius)"`
394	- Text: `fontSize: 10`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"` (some instances use `fontSize: 10`, others inherit)
395	
396	**`PointResolutionIndicator` labels:**
397	- Checking (`…`): `fontSize: 10`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`
398	- Found (✓): `fontSize: 10`, `color: "#22c55e"` (hardcoded — same as WS dot in pass 1)
399	- Not found (⚠ not found): `fontSize: 10`, `color: "#facc15"` (hardcoded yellow)
400	
401	**Collapsed "INSPECTOR" label:**
402	- `fontSize: 9`, `color: "var(--io-text-muted)"`, `writingMode: "vertical-lr"`, `transform: "rotate(180deg)"`
403	
404	**NavigationLinkEditor toggle button:**
405	- `fontSize: 11`, `color: hasLink ? "var(--io-accent)" : "var(--io-text-secondary)"` — changes color semantically based on state (good pattern)
406	- Disclosure glyph: `fontSize: 9`, inline Unicode ▲/▼
407	
408	**Letter-spacing survey across all uppercase label contexts in RightPanel:**
409	
410	| Context | `letterSpacing` |
411	|---|---|
412	| `FieldLabel` | `0.05em` |
413	| `TabBar` tabs | `0.06em` |
414	| `CanvasLayersPanel` header | `0.08em` |
415	| "Shape Info" card | `0.06em` |
416	| Type badge | `0.04em` |
417	| `RowSection` title | none (not uppercase) |
418	
419	**Deviations from app shell:**
420	
421	1. **`RowSection` section title is 11px, regular case, `var(--io-text-secondary)`.** `FieldLabel`
422	   is 10px, uppercase, `var(--io-text-muted)`. Both delimit sub-groups of form controls within
423	   the same panel, but use different size, transform, and color tier. No shared primitive
424	   unifies these two label levels.
425	
426	2. **Four different `letterSpacing` values (0em, 0.04em, 0.05em, 0.06em, 0.08em) appear across
427	   uppercase label contexts in the same file.** The app shell defines no token for
428	   letter-spacing; this is consistent with the absence found in pass 1, but the variation
429	   is wider here (five distinct values vs. the two or three seen in the toolbar shell files).
430	
431	3. **`PointResolutionIndicator` hardcodes `#22c55e` (found) and `#facc15` (not found)** rather
432	   than using `var(--io-alarm-normal)` and `var(--io-alarm-low)` or equivalent tokens. The `#22c55e`
433	   hardcoding is consistent with the WS dot finding in pass 1 (category 8).
434	
435	4. **No semantic heading elements in DesignerRightPanel.** All structural labels are `<div>`,
436	   `<span>`, or `<label>`. Section-level headers that could use `<h3>` (e.g., "Shape Info"
437	   card, CanvasLayersPanel header) do not. Consistent with the inconsistency found in pass 1
438	   but at a greater scale (the entire inspector panel).
439	
440	5. **`RowSection` header is a `<div onClick>` without ARIA role.** It acts as a disclosure
441	   button but is not accessible to keyboard users and does not receive focus. (Repeated from
442	   category 7 where it is reported as a form input deviation; listed here as it is also a
443	   label/header deviation.)
444	
445	6. **Disclosure glyphs are Unicode characters (▲/▼, ▶/▼) not SVG icons.** `RowSection`
446	   uses ▲/▼ at `fontSize: 8`. `CanvasLayerRow` expand toggle uses ▶/▼ at `fontSize: 8`.
447	   Consistent within the file, but different from the `IconChevron` SVG used in the left
448	   palette's `SectionHeader`, and different from the toolbar's text glyphs.
449	
450	7. **Tab labels use `fontWeight: 700` for active state** while the left palette's section
451	   headers use `fontWeight: 600` at the same label scale (11px vs. 10px). Neither matches
452	   the tab weight conventions from the `DesignerTabBar` (which uses 600/400 active/inactive).
453	   Three different weight conventions for "active vs. inactive" tab/section labeling across
454	   the designer panels.
455	
456	**Notes:** The right panel contains more label diversity in a single file than all the
457	toolbar shell files combined. The `FieldLabel` component is the one stable convention —
458	it is used consistently for every form field label in the inspector and could serve as a
459	foundation for a shared label system if the letterSpacing and size conventions were
460	consolidated.
461
